subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Glorious Beauty! The letter thou didst write to his honor Manshadi was perused [3.5s]... ...Thou didst write as to the children: from the very beginning, the children must receive divine education
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی نامه ای که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گشت از
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
